fg_pct_z.how: FG made / FG attempted. Z-scored vs all 2024 kickers with 10+ attempts.
fg_pct_z.limits: Doesn't account for distance or difficulty.

fg_40_pct_z.limits: Smaller sample. Some kickers attempt more long FGs due to team trust.

fg_over_expected_z.what: FG makes above pre-snap probability — difficulty-adjusted accuracy
fg_over_expected_z.how: Average of (actual make - fg_prob) per attempt. Positive = beating expectations.
fg_over_expected_z.limits: fg_prob model doesn't fully capture weather or indoor advantage.

fg_epa_z.how: EPA on all field goal plays.
fg_epa_z.limits: Influenced by when the team chooses to kick vs go for it.

clutch_pct_z.what: FG make % in clutch — 4th Q/OT, game within 8 points
clutch_pct_z.limits: Small samples — most kickers get 5-10 clutch attempts per season.

clutch_epa_z.what: EPA on clutch field goal attempts
clutch_epa_z.how: Average EPA on 4th Q/OT kicks within 8 points.
clutch_epa_z.limits: Small sample. One miss can crater this stat.
